name: Mouth Invasion
outcome: Gren gives [ThePlayerName] a lingering kiss and sticks to him, grabbing his head as she thirstily makes out with him!
miss: [AttackerName] tries to lock mouths with [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to keep [TargetHisOrHer] distance, preventing the makeout session!
statusOutcome: In the midst of Gren's lavish kissing session, [TargetName] gulps down some of her sweet-tasting mucus. Immediately, [TargetName] feels himself get more relaxed and complacent. Your defense has been lowered!
